---
title: "Student Lab Guide"
subtitle: "DE4W Capstone Project"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

# Goal

In this lab, you will work through an end-to-end wearable machine learning pipeline:

```text
raw accelerometer data
→ windows
→ features
→ model
→ evaluation
→ API
→ dashboard
→ live phyphox prediction
```

# Setup

Install dependencies:

```bash
uv sync
```

Check imports:

```bash
uv run python -c "import app.api, app.training, app.evaluation, app.model_utils; print('ready')"
```

# Data Placement

Place WISDM phone accelerometer files in `data/`.

Expected names:

```text
data_1600_accel_phone.txt
data_1601_accel_phone.txt
...
```

The generated feature table is:

```text
data/features_df.csv
```

# Render The Course Book

Use the project Python environment:

```bash
PATH=.venv/bin:$PATH quarto render docs
```

If plain `quarto render docs` fails because Jupyter or PyYAML is missing, use the command above.

# Train Or Export The Model

The project already includes model artifacts.

If you need to regenerate them, work through the machine learning and evaluation chapters.

Expected artifacts:

```text
models/activity_model_random_forest.joblib
models/feature_columns.joblib
models/activity_labels.joblib
models/model_metadata.json
```

# Start FastAPI

Run:

```bash
uv run uvicorn app.api:app --reload
```

Open:

```text
http://127.0.0.1:8000/health
```

You should see `model_loaded: true`.

# Start Streamlit

Run:

```bash
uv run streamlit run dashboard.py
```

The dashboard asks for:

- phyphox URL
- window size
- demo duration

# Connect phyphox

On your phone:

1. Open phyphox.
2. Start an acceleration experiment.
3. Enable remote access.
4. Copy the shown URL.
5. Paste it into Streamlit.

# Troubleshooting

## phyphox URL Does Not Open

Make sure phone and laptop are on the same network.

eduroam may block direct communication.

Try:

- smartphone hotspot
- local WiFi router
- travel router

## API Health Fails

Check that model artifacts exist in `models/`.

## Prediction Fails With Missing Features

The model expects all 20 feature columns saved in `models/feature_columns.joblib`.

Do not manually invent feature names.

Use the feature extraction pipeline.

## Streamlit Stops With A phyphox Error

Read the dashboard message.

Most failures are caused by:

- wrong phyphox URL
- remote access disabled
- phone and laptop on different networks
- eduroam blocking local traffic

# Completion Checklist

You are done when you can:

- render the Quarto book,
- explain random split vs subject-wise split,
- start `/health`,
- start Streamlit,
- describe the live prediction pipeline,
- explain the eduroam/hotspot lesson.
